response: LeBron James is a dominant force on the court, averaging 28.4 points, 7.2 rebounds, and 8.1 assists per game, while leading the Lakers to a 71- game season. He is a two-time NBA champion and four-time NBA Most Valuable Player, and has been selected to the All-Star team for the 2024-25 season. At 40 years old, James continues to defy the odds with his incredible athleticism and skill, making him one of the most feared players in the league.
